title: Savory Croatian Vegetarian Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine made with a variety of vegetables and spices, inspired by Croatian cuisine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the onions and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the bell peppers, zucchini, and carrots. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chili powder, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the crushed tomatoes and vegetable broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
